summary: Build a question editor with a home-screen menu/theme update, and fix table/pair components to support per-cell editing, inline images, and consistent cell sizing with print-safe PDF output.
known_issues: Currently cannot type inside table/pair cells; input goes to the top question field instead

existing_features.title: Update the app theme to match the uploaded screenshots: make the home-screen navigation drawer/menu background white (not purple) and lighten the purple used across the UI to match the screenshots exactly (apply globally to buttons, borders, highlights, accents, and selected nav item).
Fix table and match-pairs editing so users can click inside each cell/box and type independently without text being redirected to the main/top question text field.

Add inline image insertion inside table cells and match-pairs boxes supporting both upload-from-device and paste-from-clipboard, while allowing text and images within the same cell/box and ensuring nothing overflows outside the cell/box boundaries.

For inserted images inside table/match-pairs cells, implement formatting controls: default size 5 × 5 cm (user adjustable), aspect ratio locked by default, alignment controls, and optional caption per image.

Enforce table sizing rules: all columns must have equal width across the table; within each row, all cells must share the same height (row-based equal heights), while different rows may have different heights.
Ensure print-safe PDF rendering for tables/match-pairs containing inline images and captions, including proper wrapping/clipping behavior and predictable sizing for A4 print output.

Update stored paper/question data handling to persist the new richer table/match-pairs cell content (text + zero or more images with formatting metadata), including backward compatibility for existing saved papers in localStorage.

new_feature_requests.summary: Update UI theme: home-screen menu background white and lighten purple theme to match provided image across all components
Fix table/pair editing so each cell/box is independently editable (typing should not redirect to the top question field)
Add inline image insertion inside table/pair cells via upload and paste, with text+image in same cell and content constrained within cell boundaries
Table/pair layout rules: equal column widths across all cells; row-based equal heights (cells in same row share height; different rows may differ)
Image formatting options for inserted images: default 5×5 cm (adjustable), aspect ratio locked by default, alignment and caption support, print-safe PDF rendering

projectName: Fix table/pair editing with inline images, consistent sizing, print-safe export, and updated theme colors from screenshots
